contents:
[package]
authors = [ "The Gtk-rs Project Developers",]
categories = [ "api-bindings",]
description = "Rust bindings for the GVnc library"
edition = "2021"
keywords = [ "vnc", "gtk-rs", "gnome",]
license = "MIT"
name = "gvnc"
repository = "https://gitlab.gnome.org/malureau/gtk-vnc-rs"
version = "0.7.0"

[dependencies]
libc = "0.2"

[dependencies.ffi]
package = "gvnc-sys"
path = "./sys"
version = "0.7.0"

[dependencies.gio]
version = "0.22"
features = [ "v2_66",]

[dependencies.glib]
version = "0.22"
features = [ "v2_66",]

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
all-features = true
rustc-args = [ "--cfg", "docsrs",]
rustdoc-args = [ "--cfg", "docsrs",]

[package]
authors = [ "The Gtk-rs Project Developers",]
build = "build.rs"
categories = [ "api-bindings",]
description = "Raw C-FFI bindings for the GVnc library"
edition = "2021"
keywords = [ "vnc", "ffi", "gtk-rs", "gnome",]
license = "MIT"
links = "gvnc-1.0"
name = "gvnc-sys"
repository = "https://gitlab.gnome.org/malureau/gtk-vnc-rs"
version = "0.7.0"

[lib]
name = "gvnc_sys"

[dependencies]
libc = "0.2"

[build-dependencies]
system-deps = "7"

[dev-dependencies]
shell-words = "1.0.0"
tempfile = "3"

[features]

[dependencies.glib-sys]
version = "0.22"
features = [ "v2_66",]

[dependencies.gio-sys]
version = "0.22"
features = [ "v2_66",]

[dependencies.gobject-sys]
version = "0.22"
features = [ "v2_66",]

[package.metadata.system-deps.gvnc_1_0]
name = "gvnc-1.0"
version = "1.0"

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
features = []
rustc-args = [ "--cfg", "docsrs",]
rustdoc-args = [ "--cfg", "docsrs", "--generate-link-to-definition",]

[package]
name = "rdw4"
version = "0.1.0"
authors = [ "Marc-André Lureau <marcandre.lureau@redhat.com>",]
edition = "2021"

[features]
default = [ "wayland", "x11",]
bindings = [ "dep:system-deps",]
wayland = [ "dep:wayland-protocols", "dep:gdk-wl", "dep:glib-unix",]
x11 = [ "dep:gdk-x11", "dep:x11",]
capi = [ "dep:env_logger", "dep:cargo_metadata", "dep:cbindgen",]

[dependencies]
log = "0.4"
derivative = "2.2.0"
libc = "0.2.155"
libloading = "0.9"
gl = "0.14.0"
usbredirhost = "0.4"
futures-channel = "0.3"
futures-util = "0.3"
epoxy = "0.1"

[build-dependencies.cargo_metadata]
optional = true
version = "0.23"

[build-dependencies.cbindgen]
path = "../cbindgen"
features = [ "gobject",]
optional = true

[build-dependencies.system-deps]
version = "7.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.khronos-egl]
version = "6.0"
features = [ "static",]

[dependencies.keycodemap]
package = "rdw-keycodemap"
path = "../keycodemap"
version = "0.1"

[dependencies.env_logger]
version = "0.11"
default-features = false
optional = true

[dependencies.glib-unix]
version = "0.22"
optional = true

[dependencies.wayland-protocols]
version = "0.32"
features = [ "unstable", "client",]
optional = true

[dependencies.x11]
version = "2.21"
optional = true

[dependencies.gtk]
features = [ "unsafe-assume-initialized", "v4_12",]
package = "gtk4"
version = "0.11"

[dependencies.gst]
package = "gstreamer"
version = "0.25"

[dependencies.gst-app]
package = "gstreamer-app"
version = "0.25"

[dependencies.gst-audio]
package = "gstreamer-audio"
version = "0.25"

[dependencies.gdk-wl]
package = "gdk4-wayland"
features = [ "v4_4", "egl", "wayland_crate",]
optional = true
version = "0.11"

[dependencies.gdk-x11]
package = "gdk4-x11"
features = [ "v4_4", "egl",]
optional = true
version = "0.11"

[target."cfg(unix)".dependencies]

[package.metadata.system-deps.rdw4]
version = "0.1"
feature = "bindings"

[package.metadata.capi.header]
name = "rdw"
subdirectory = "rdw4"
generation = false

[package.metadata.capi.pkg_config]
filename = "rdw4"
requires = "gtk4"

[target."cfg(windows)".dependencies.windows]
version = "0.61.0"
features = [ "Win32_Devices_HumanInterfaceDevice", "Win32_Foundation", "Win32_Graphics_Gdi", "Win32_Graphics_Dxgi", "Win32_System_LibraryLoader", "Win32_System_Threading", "Win32_System_WindowsProgramming", "Win32_UI_Input", "Win32_UI_Input_KeyboardAndMouse", "Win32_UI_WindowsAndMessaging", "Win32_Graphics_Direct3D11",]

[target."cfg(windows)".dependencies.gdk-win32]
package = "gdk4-win32"
features = [ "v4_4", "win32", "egl",]
version = "0.10"

[package]
name = "rdw4-rdp"
version = "0.2.0"
authors = [ "Marc-André Lureau <marcandre.lureau@redhat.com>",]
edition = "2021"

[features]
default = []
bindings = [ "rdw/bindings", "dep:system-deps",]
capi = [ "dep:cargo_metadata", "dep:cbindgen",]

[dependencies]
thiserror = "2.0.12"
derivative = "2.2.0"
futures-executor = "0.3"
futures-util = "0.3"
futures-channel = "0.3"
tracing = "0.1"
whoami = "2.1"

[build-dependencies.cargo_metadata]
optional = true
version = "0.23"

[build-dependencies.cbindgen]
path = "../cbindgen"
features = [ "gobject",]
optional = true

[build-dependencies.system-deps]
version = "7.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.ironrdp]
version = "0.14.0"
features = [ "cliprdr", "dvc", "displaycontrol", "session", "connector", "rdpdr", "graphics", "pdu", "rdpsnd",]

[dependencies.ironrdp-tokio]
version = "0.8"
features = [ "reqwest",]

[dependencies.ironrdp-tls]
version = "0.2.0"
features = [ "native-tls",]

[dependencies.x509-cert]
version = "0.2"
default-features = false
features = [ "std",]

[dependencies.tokio]
version = "1.44.1"
features = [ "net", "rt", "macros",]

[dependencies.rdw]
package = "rdw4"
path = "../rdw4"
default-features = false

[dependencies.nix]
version = "0.31"
features = [ "fs", "event",]

[package.metadata.system-deps.rdw4-rdp]
version = "0.1"
feature = "bindings"

[package.metadata.capi.library]
name = "rdw4-rdp"

[package.metadata.capi.header]
name = "rdw-rdp"
subdirectory = "rdw4"
generation = false

[package.metadata.capi.pkg_config]
filename = "rdw4-rdp"
requires = [ "rdw4",]

[target."cfg(windows)".dependencies.windows]
version = "0.61"
features = [ "Win32_System_Threading", "Win32_Foundation", "Win32_Security",]

[package]
name = "rdw4-spice"
version = "0.1.0"
authors = [ "Marc-André Lureau <marcandre.lureau@redhat.com>",]
edition = "2021"

[features]
default = []
bindings = [ "rdw/bindings", "dep:system-deps",]
capi = [ "dep:cargo_metadata", "dep:cbindgen",]

[dependencies]
log = "0.4"
derivative = "2.2.0"
futures-channel = "0.3"
futures-util = "0.3"

[build-dependencies.cargo_metadata]
optional = true
version = "0.23"

[build-dependencies.cbindgen]
path = "../cbindgen"
features = [ "gobject",]
optional = true

[build-dependencies.system-deps]
version = "7.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.rdw]
package = "rdw4"
path = "../rdw4"
default-features = false

[dependencies.spice-client-glib]
git = "https://gitlab.gnome.org/theCapypara/spice-gtk-rs.git"
rev = "5fe660a1894d0a9fc04e00df5d23bac712434a12"

[package.metadata.system-deps.rdw4-spice]
version = "0.1"
feature = "bindings"

[package.metadata.capi.library]
name = "rdw4-spice"

[package.metadata.capi.header]
name = "rdw-spice"
subdirectory = "rdw4"
generation = false

[package.metadata.capi.pkg_config]
filename = "rdw4-spice"
requires = "rdw4"

[package]
name = "rdw4-vnc"
version = "0.1.0"
authors = [ "Marc-André Lureau <marcandre.lureau@redhat.com>",]
edition = "2021"

[features]
default = []
bindings = [ "rdw/bindings", "dep:system-deps",]
capi = [ "dep:cargo_metadata", "dep:cbindgen",]

[dependencies]
log = "0.4"
derivative = "2.2.0"

[build-dependencies.cargo_metadata]
optional = true
version = "0.23"

[build-dependencies.cbindgen]
path = "../cbindgen"
features = [ "gobject",]
optional = true

[build-dependencies.system-deps]
version = "7.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.rdw]
package = "rdw4"
path = "../rdw4"
default-features = false

[dependencies.gvnc]
git = "https://gitlab.gnome.org/theCapypara/gtk-vnc-rs.git"
rev = "6ec794f551999b6f0bf41ea3cec111a79342a91e"

[package.metadata.system-deps.rdw4-vnc]
version = "0.1"
feature = "bindings"

[package.metadata.capi.library]
name = "rdw4-vnc"

[package.metadata.capi.header]
name = "rdw-vnc"
subdirectory = "rdw4"
generation = false

[package.metadata.capi.pkg_config]
filename = "rdw4-vnc"
requires = "rdw4"

[package]
authors = [ "The Gtk-rs Project Developers",]
categories = [ "api-bindings",]
description = "Rust bindings for the Spice client library"
edition = "2021"
keywords = [ "spice", "gtk-rs", "gnome",]
license = "MIT"
name = "spice-client-glib"
repository = "https://gitlab.gnome.org/malureau/spice-gtk-rs"
version = "0.8.0"

[dependencies]
libc = "0.2"
rusb = "0.9.0"

[dependencies.ffi]
package = "spice-client-glib-sys"
path = "./sys"
version = "0.8.0"

[dependencies.glib]
version = "0.22"
features = [ "v2_66",]

[dependencies.gio]
version = "0.22"
features = [ "v2_66",]

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
all-features = true
rustc-args = [ "--cfg", "docsrs",]
rustdoc-args = [ "--cfg", "docsrs",]

[package]
authors = [ "The Gtk-rs Project Developers",]
build = "build.rs"
categories = [ "api-bindings",]
description = "Raw C-FFI bindings for the Spice GLib library"
edition = "2021"
keywords = [ "spice", "ffi", "gtk-rs", "gnome",]
license = "MIT"
links = "spice-client-glib-2.0"
name = "spice-client-glib-sys"
repository = "https://gitlab.gnome.org/malureau/spice-gtk-rs"
version = "0.8.0"

[lib]
name = "spice_client_glib_sys"

[dependencies]
libc = "0.2"

[build-dependencies]
system-deps = "7"

[dev-dependencies]
shell-words = "1.0.0"
tempfile = "3"

[features]
v0_6 = []
v0_7 = [ "v0_6",]
v0_8 = [ "v0_7",]
v0_9 = [ "v0_8",]
v0_11 = [ "v0_9",]
v0_13 = [ "v0_11",]
v0_15 = [ "v0_13",]
v0_17 = [ "v0_15",]
v0_20 = [ "v0_17",]
v0_21 = [ "v0_20",]
v0_22 = [ "v0_21",]
v0_24 = [ "v0_22",]
v0_27 = [ "v0_24",]
v0_28 = [ "v0_27",]
v0_29 = [ "v0_28",]
v0_30 = [ "v0_29",]
v0_31 = [ "v0_30",]
v0_32 = [ "v0_31",]
v0_33 = [ "v0_32",]
v0_34 = [ "v0_33",]
v0_35 = [ "v0_34",]
v0_36 = [ "v0_35",]
v0_37 = [ "v0_36",]
v0_38 = [ "v0_37",]
v0_39 = [ "v0_38",]
v0_40 = []
v0_41 = [ "v0_40",]
v0_42 = [ "v0_41",]

[dependencies.glib-sys]
version = "0.22"
features = [ "v2_66",]

[dependencies.gio-sys]
version = "0.22"
features = [ "v2_66",]

[dependencies.gobject-sys]
version = "0.22"
features = [ "v2_66",]

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0]
name = "spice-client-glib-2.0"
version = "0.39"

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
features = []
rustc-args = [ "--cfg", "docsrs",]
rustdoc-args = [ "--cfg", "docsrs", "--generate-link-to-definition",]

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_6]
version = "0.6"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_7]
version = "0.7"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_8]
version = "0.8"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_9]
version = "0.9"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_11]
version = "0.11"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_13]
version = "0.13"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_15]
version = "0.15"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_17]
version = "0.17"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_20]
version = "0.20"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_21]
version = "0.21"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_22]
version = "0.22"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_24]
version = "0.24"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_27]
version = "0.27"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_28]
version = "0.28"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_29]
version = "0.29"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_30]
version = "0.30"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_31]
version = "0.31"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_32]
version = "0.32"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_33]
version = "0.33"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_34]
version = "0.34"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_35]
version = "0.35"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_36]
version = "0.36"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_37]
version = "0.37"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_38]
version = "0.38"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_39]
version = "0.39"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_40]
version = "0.40"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_41]
version = "0.41"

[package.metadata.system-deps.spice_client_glib_2_0.v0_42]
version = "0.42"

[[example]]
name = "client"
required-features = [ "parent_window_gtk4", "_glib_log",]

[package]
name = "spice-gtk-usb-portal"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "Bridge between spice-gtk and the USB portal"
authors = [ "Marco Köpcke <hello@capypara.de>",]
edition = "2024"

[lib]
crate-type = [ "cdylib", "rlib", "staticlib",]

[features]
parent_window_gtk4 = [ "ashpd/gtk4",]
parent_window_gtk4_wayland = [ "ashpd/gtk4_wayland",]
parent_window_gtk4_x11 = [ "ashpd/gtk4_x11",]
parent_window_wayland = [ "ashpd/wayland",]
parent_window_raw_handle = [ "ashpd/raw_handle",]
capi = [ "dep:cargo_metadata", "dep:cbindgen", "dep:gtk", "parent_window_gtk4",]
_glib_log = [ "glib/log",]

[dependencies]
log = "0.4"
futures-util = "0.3"
regex = "1.12"

[dev-dependencies]
stderrlog = "0.6"

[build-dependencies.cargo_metadata]
version = "0.23"
optional = true

[build-dependencies.cbindgen]
git = "https://github.com/elmarco/cbindgen.git"
rev = "0bb9eb6764a78929f3326187e0eef50287c41923"
features = [ "gobject",]
optional = true

[dependencies.glib]
version = "0.22"

[dependencies.gio]
version = "0.22"

[dependencies.gtk]
package = "gtk4"
version = "0.11"
optional = true

[dependencies.ashpd]
version = "0.13"
features = [ "usb", "async-io", "glib",]
default-features = false

[dependencies.spice-client-glib]
git = "https://gitlab.gnome.org/theCapypara/spice-gtk-rs.git"
rev = "5fe660a1894d0a9fc04e00df5d23bac712434a12"

[dev-dependencies.gtk]
package = "gtk4"
version = "0.11"

[dev-dependencies.rdw]
package = "rdw4"
git = "https://gitlab.gnome.org/theCapypara/rdw.git"
rev = "c5f22c24b74eaa4ad2829bd533b7e440140b6df9"

[dev-dependencies.rdw-spice]
package = "rdw4-spice"
git = "https://gitlab.gnome.org/theCapypara/rdw.git"
rev = "c5f22c24b74eaa4ad2829bd533b7e440140b6df9"

[package.metadata.capi.header]
name = "spice-usb-portal"
subdirectory = "spice-gtk-usb-portal"
generation = false

[package.metadata.capi.library]
name = "spice-gtk-usb-portal"

[package.metadata.capi.pkg_config]
filename = "spice-gtk-usb-portal"
requires = "gtk4 spice-client-glib-2.0"

[source.vendored-sources]
directory = "cargo/vendor"

[source.crates-io]
replace-with = "vendored-sources"

[source."https://gitlab.gnome.org/theCapypara/gtk-vnc-rs"]
git = "https://gitlab.gnome.org/theCapypara/gtk-vnc-rs"
replace-with = "vendored-sources"
rev = "6ec794f551999b6f0bf41ea3cec111a79342a91e"

[source."https://gitlab.gnome.org/theCapypara/rdw"]
git = "https://gitlab.gnome.org/theCapypara/rdw"
replace-with = "vendored-sources"
rev = "283a58447a35fb00170f39c80a0c0846754ccb64"

[source."https://gitlab.gnome.org/theCapypara/spice-gtk-rs"]
git = "https://gitlab.gnome.org/theCapypara/spice-gtk-rs"
replace-with = "vendored-sources"
rev = "5fe660a1894d0a9fc04e00df5d23bac712434a12"

[source."https://github.com/thecapypara/spice-gtk-usb-portal"]
git = "https://github.com/thecapypara/spice-gtk-usb-portal"
replace-with = "vendored-sources"
rev = "fc0e0cf38b225eee38681fe83741dda5c858a7a3"
